name: Tiny Tycoon
title: Tiny Tycoon | Weekly Arcade - Boba Tea Shop Simulator
description: Play Tiny Tycoon free online. Run a cozy boba tea shop in 60-second days — tap to serve customers, earn coins, upgrade your shop, and chase the highest single-day revenue on the leaderboard. No download required.
keywords: tiny tycoon, boba tea game, idle game, time management, arcade game, browser game, free game, shop simulator
tips: Upgrade your serving speed first — faster service means more customers served per 60-second day
Don't skip the coin multiplier upgrades — they compound your earnings dramatically
Prioritize upgrades that increase customers per day over cosmetic shop changes
Watch for rush hour events — serve quickly during rushes for bonus coins
Reinvest all coins into upgrades early; save cosmetic purchases for later
howToPlay: Tap to serve customers in your boba tea shop. Each day lasts 60 seconds. Earn coins from sales, then spend them on upgrades between days. Upgrade serving speed, menu items, and shop capacity to maximize daily revenue.
aboutGame: Tiny Tycoon is a cozy business simulation game where you run a boba tea shop in 60-second days. Serve customers by tapping orders, earn coins, and spend them on upgrades between days. The game features a satisfying progression loop with shop upgrades, menu expansion, and capacity increases. Designed for quick, rewarding sessions.

faq.a: Yes. Tiny Tycoon is 100% free on Weekly Arcade - no ads, no in-app purchases, no downloads required.

faq.q: How long is a day in Tiny Tycoon?
faq.a: Each in-game day lasts exactly 60 seconds. Serve as many customers as possible to maximize your daily revenue, then spend coins on upgrades between days.

faq.q: What can you upgrade in Tiny Tycoon?
faq.a: Upgrade your serving speed, menu variety, shop capacity, and customer attraction. Each upgrade changes how you play and increases your earning potential.
